title: Buyer adds Tax/Charge/Discount via TCD sub-screen — UI splice via POCRTMAINLNK4
user_persona: Buyer who needs to apply a freight charge and a volume discount

conversation.user: Build a PO for SUP-77, USD, buyer BUY-44. Line: ITM-55 100 units at 20. Add a $200 freight charge and a 5% volume discount.

bot_must: acknowledge header + line + 2 TCD entries to add
ask for tcd_type, tcd_value for each (charge = +200, discount = 5% of line)

conversation.user: Confirm both: Freight charge fixed 200 USD. Volume discount 5% of line value.

bot_must: compute new line totals: line = 100*20 = 2000, +200 charge -100 discount (5% of 2000) = 2100
save TCD sub-screen and return to main

evaluation_metrics.tcd_extraction: both charge and discount extracted from one sentence with types
evaluation_metrics.total_computation: bot computes correct PO total including TCD
